tools.name: unreal.workflow_recommend

tools.notes: Generated task-specific steps are skipped placeholders until exact arguments are filled from retrieved evidence.

tools.name: unreal.editor.python_runtime_info
tools.title: Editor Python Runtime Info
tools.description: Reports read-only Python runtime interpreter, module-count, and Unreal module details to confirm the python implementation track is working.
tools.reason: Python implementation track smoke tool. Underlying operation is read-only, but Lane E defaults python-track registry entries to critical risk and external-process handling.
tools.summaryTemplate: Reported Unreal Python {result.python.versionInfo.major}.{result.python.versionInfo.minor} with {result.python.moduleCount} loaded modules

policy.reason: Python implementation track smoke tool. Underlying operation is read-only, but Lane E defaults python-track registry entries to critical risk and external-process handling.
policy.summaryTemplate: Reported Unreal Python {result.python.versionInfo.major}.{result.python.versionInfo.minor} with {result.python.moduleCount} loaded modules

tools.notes: Read-only canonical first Python-track smoke tool; use to verify PythonScriptPlugin bridge execution and handler hash enforcement.

tools.name: unreal.actor_get_property
tools.title: Get Actor Property
tools.description: Reads a single UProperty value from a named actor, including supported dot-paths through struct or object properties.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 1 C++ readback inspector: read-only actor property access closes the get/inspect gap without Python.

actorPath.description: Full actor label, actor name, or unique actor path to inspect.

propertyName.description: UProperty name or dot-path, for example bHidden, Tags, or StaticMeshComponent.StaticMesh.

tools.notes: C++ only. Supports dot notation through reflected struct and object properties; unsupported values fall back to exported text where possible.

tools.name: unreal.actor_get_transform
tools.title: Get Actor Transform
tools.description: Reads an actor transform in world or relative space without mutating editor state.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 1 C++ readback inspector: read-only actor transform access closes the get/inspect gap without Python.

actorPath.description: Full actor label, actor name, or unique actor path to inspect.

tools.notes: C++ only. Reads during PIE because it does not mutate editor or world state.

tools.name: unreal.project_settings_get
tools.title: Get Project Setting
tools.description: Reads a single project-settings key from a supported UDeveloperSettings object or config-backed category.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 1 C++ readback inspector: read-only project settings access closes the get/inspect gap without Python.

key.description: Project settings key or dot-path inside the category, for example DefaultGameMode, DefaultInputAxisMappings, or DefaultRHI.

tools.notes: C++ only. MVP maps common categories to UInputSettings, URendererSettings, and hardcoded config sections, returning KEY_NOT_FOUND for unsupported edge cases.

tools.name: unreal.bp_delete_node
tools.title: Delete Blueprint Node
tools.description: Deletes a user-deletable Blueprint graph node by NodeGuid and reports the severed pin links.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 2a C++ Blueprint refactor tool: bounded node deletion by GUID without Python.

nodeGuid.description: NodeGuid as 32 hex digits or hyphenated GUID text.

tools.notes: PIE-blocked. Returns BLUEPRINT_NOT_FOUND, GRAPH_NOT_FOUND, NODE_NOT_FOUND, or NODE_NOT_DELETABLE on structured errors.

tools.name: unreal.bp_delete_variable
tools.title: Delete Blueprint Variable
tools.description: Deletes a Blueprint member variable after checking local reference nodes unless force=true.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 2a C++ Blueprint refactor tool: bounded variable deletion with reference-count guard.

variableName.description: Blueprint member variable name to delete.

force.description: Delete even when reference nodes are present.

tools.notes: PIE-blocked. force=false returns REFERENCES_PRESENT with referenceCount instead of mutating when references exist.

tools.name: unreal.bp_delete_function
tools.title: Delete Blueprint Function
tools.description: Deletes a user function graph and reports caller nodes found in the same Blueprint.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 2a C++ Blueprint refactor tool: bounded user function graph deletion without Python.

functionName.description: User function graph name to delete.

tools.notes: PIE-blocked. Built-in graphs such as EventGraph and UserConstructionScript return FUNCTION_NOT_DELETABLE.

tools.name: unreal.bp_rename_variable
tools.title: Rename Blueprint Variable
tools.description: Renames a Blueprint member variable and rewrites local graph references.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 2a C++ Blueprint refactor tool: variable rename plus local graph reference rewrite without Python.

newName.description: New valid Blueprint identifier for the member variable.

tools.notes: PIE-blocked. Invalid identifiers return INVALID_NAME with reason not-an-identifier or reserved-word; existing variables return RENAME_COLLISION.

tools.name: unreal.bp_rename_function
tools.title: Rename Blueprint Function
tools.description: Renames a user function graph and rewrites local caller nodes.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 2a C++ Blueprint refactor tool: function graph rename plus local caller rewrite without Python.

newName.description: New valid Blueprint identifier for the function graph.

tools.notes: PIE-blocked. Built-in graph renames return FUNCTION_NOT_RENAMABLE; name collisions with graphs or functions return RENAME_COLLISION.

tools.name: unreal.bp_add_macro_graph
tools.title: Add Blueprint Macro Graph
tools.description: Creates a user macro graph on a Blueprint after fixed-name validation and collision checks.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 2b C++ Blueprint refactor tool: macro graph creation with identifier validation and collision checks.

macroName.description: New valid Blueprint macro graph name.

tools.notes: PIE-blocked. Invalid identifiers return INVALID_NAME with reason not-an-identifier or reserved-word; existing graph/function/macro/variable names return RENAME_COLLISION.

tools.name: unreal.bp_delete_macro_graph
tools.title: Delete Blueprint Macro Graph
tools.description: Deletes a Blueprint macro graph after checking local macro instance references unless force=true.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 2b C++ Blueprint refactor tool: guarded macro graph deletion with reference-count reporting.

macroName.description: Existing Blueprint macro graph name to delete.

force.description: Delete even when UK2Node_MacroInstance references are present.

tools.notes: PIE-blocked. Missing macros return MACRO_NOT_FOUND; force=false returns REFERENCES_PRESENT with referenceCount when macro instance nodes still reference the graph.

tools.name: unreal.bp_interface_add
tools.title: Add Blueprint Interface
tools.description: Adds a Blueprint-implementable interface to a Blueprint and conforms exposed interface function graphs.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 2b C++ Blueprint refactor tool: interface implementation with Blueprint usability checks.

interfacePath.description: Full UInterface-derived class path to implement.

tools.notes: PIE-blocked. Missing class paths return INTERFACE_NOT_FOUND; non-interface, Blueprint-unusable, prohibited, or already implemented interfaces return INTERFACE_NOT_USABLE.

tools.name: unreal.bp_interface_remove
tools.title: Remove Blueprint Interface
tools.description: Removes an implemented interface from a Blueprint and optionally preserves its function graphs.
tools.reason: v0.15 chunk 2b C++ Blueprint refactor tool: interface removal with optional function preservation.

interfacePath.description: Full implemented interface class path to remove.

preserveFunctions.description: Keep interface function graphs as orphan functions instead of deleting them.

tools.notes: PIE-blocked. Missing Blueprint assets return BLUEPRINT_NOT_FOUND; absent or non-interface implementations return INTERFACE_NOT_FOUND.
